prompt_text: Best way to track product adoption and identify at-risk accounts before they churn for a enterprise SaaS customer success teams managing large portfolios team
response:
# Product Adoption & Churn Risk Framework for Enterprise SaaS

## 1. Core Metrics Dashboard

**Usage Metrics (Real-time)**
- Feature adoption rate by account segment
- Monthly active users (MAU) vs. licensed seats
- Days since last login (user-level)
- Feature breadth score: # of unique features used / total available
- Time-to-value (TTV) milestones: first login → core feature use → advanced features

**Engagement Scoring**
- Weighted usage scoring (assign points to critical features)
- API call volume or data processing volume
- Login frequency and session duration trends
- Interaction with premium/expansion features

## 2. Risk Scoring Model

**Predictive Indicators (Build or use Gainsight/Vitally)**

| Signal | Weight | Red Flag |
|--------|--------|----------|
| Usage decline | 25% | >30% month-over-month drop |
| Feature stagnation | 20% | No new features used in 60+ days |
| Support tickets (negative sentiment) | 20% | Spike in unresolved issues |
| Expansion opportunity missed | 15% | Unused seats, underutilized tiers |
| Executive disengagement | 10% | No C-level logins, stakeholder silence |
| NPS decline | 10% | Drop >10 points YoY |

**Composite Risk Score**: 0-100 (flag anything >60 as at-risk)

## 3. Segmentation Strategy

**Tier 1 Accounts (Heavy Monitoring)**
- Top 20% ARR, executive oversight required
- Weekly health checks via automated alerts
- Dedicated CS assigned

**Tier 2 Accounts (Balanced)**
- Mid-market, quarterly business reviews
- Bi-weekly automated health snapshots

**Tier 3 Accounts (Scaled)**
- SMB/self-serve, automated playbooks
- Monthly digest reports

## 4. Implementation Roadmap

### Phase 1: Instrumentation (Weeks 1-4)
```
- Track product telemetry (feature flags, button clicks, workflows)
- Integrate CRM with product data (Segment, mParticle, or native API)
- Map customer journey milestones
- Define "health" = X features used by Y% of team within Z days
```

### Phase 2: Dashboard & Alerts (Weeks 5-8)
- Build adoption dashboard (tools: Mixpanel, Amplitude, Looker, Tableau)
- Set up automated Slack alerts for risk score changes
- Create account health cards (one-page snapshots)
- Enable drill-down to user-level activity

### Phase 3: Playbook Development (Weeks 9-12)
- Early stage: onboarding checks, training offers
- Declining: 1:1 executive call, feature education, use-case review
- High risk (>75 score): expansion discussion, renewal negotiation support

## 5. Operational Workflows

**Weekly Triage Meeting (30 min)**
- Review accounts scoring 60-74 (at-risk)
- Identify owners, assign actions
- Track previous week's interventions

**Early Warning System**
- Alert when: usage drops 20%+ in one week
- Alert when: key user disengages (C-suite logins stop)
- Alert when: only 1-2 people using product (concentration risk)

**Quarterly Business Reviews (QBR)**
- Data-driven agenda: "Here's your top 3 underutilized features"
- Show peer benchmarks: "Companies like you use X features"
- Identify expansion: unused capabilities matching their use case

## 6. Technology Stack Recommendations

**Best-in-Class (Dedicated CS Software)**
- **Gainsight** (most comprehensive)
- **Totango** (flexible scoring)
- **Vitally** (modern, API-first)
- **Planhat** (strong for Tier 2/3)

**Build-Your-Own (Lower cost, more custom)**
- Product analytics: Amplitude, Mixpanel, PostHog
- Data warehouse: Snowflake + dbt
- BI layer: Looker, Mode Analytics, Metabase
- Alerting: Slack-native or Zapier integrations

## 7. Quick Wins to Deploy This Week
